fields.name: JQOVF
fields.description: ADC group injected contexts queue overflow flag

enum_values.name: NoOverflow
enum_values.description: No injected context queue overflow has occurred

enum_values.name: Overflow
enum_values.description: Injected context queue overflow has occurred

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Clear injected context queue overflow flag

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Clear analog watchdog event occurred flag

fields.name: JEOS
fields.description: ADC group injected end of sequence conversions flag

fields.name: JEOC
fields.description: ADC group injected end of unitary conversion flag

fields.name: EOS
fields.description: ADC group regular end of sequence conversions flag

fields.name: EOC
fields.description: ADC group regular end of unitary conversion flag

fields.name: EOSMP
fields.description: ADC group regular end of sampling flag

enum_values.name: NotEnded
enum_values.description: End of sampling phase no yet reached

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Clear end of sampling phase reached flag

enum_values.name: NotReady
enum_values.description: ADC is not ready to start conversion

enum_values.name: Ready
enum_values.description: ADC is ready to start conversion

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Clear ADC is ready to start conversion flag

fields.name: JQOVFIE
fields.description: ADC group injected contexts queue overflow interrupt

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Injected context queue overflow interrupt disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Injected context queue overflow interrupt enabled

fields.name: JEOSIE
fields.description: ADC group injected end of sequence conversions interrupt

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: End of injected sequence interrupt disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: End of injected sequence interrupt enabled

fields.name: JEOCIE
fields.description: ADC group injected end of unitary conversion interrupt

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: End of injected conversion interrupt disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: End of injected conversion interrupt enabled

fields.name: EOSIE
fields.description: ADC group regular end of sequence conversions interrupt

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: End of regular sequence interrupt disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: End of regular sequence interrupt enabled

fields.name: EOCIE
fields.description: ADC group regular end of unitary conversion interrupt

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: End of regular conversion interrupt disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: End of regular conversion interrupt enabled

fields.name: EOSMPIE
fields.description: ADC group regular end of sampling interrupt

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: End of regular conversion sampling phase interrupt disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: End of regular conversion sampling phase interrupt enabled

enum_values.name: NotCalibrating
enum_values.description: ADC calibration either not yet performed or completed

enum_values.name: PowerUp
enum_values.description: ADC not in deep power down

enum_values.name: LT6_25
enum_values.description: Boost mode used when ADC clock ≤ 6.25 MHz

enum_values.name: LT12_5
enum_values.description: Boost mode used when 6.25 MHz < ADC clock ≤ 12.5 MHz

enum_values.name: LT25
enum_values.description: Boost mode used when 12.5 MHz < ADC clock ≤ 25.0 MHz

enum_values.name: LT50
enum_values.description: Boost mode used when 25.0 MHz < ADC clock ≤ 50.0 MHz

enum_values.name: Active
enum_values.description: ADC operating and may be converting

enum_values.name: StartConversion
enum_values.description: Start the ADC conversion (may be delayed for hardware triggers)

fields.name: JQDIS
fields.description: ADC group injected contexts queue disable

fields.name: AWD1CH
fields.description: ADC analog watchdog 1 monitored channel selection

fields.name: JAUTO
fields.description: ADC group injected automatic trigger mode

fields.name: JAWD1EN
fields.description: ADC analog watchdog 1 enable on scope ADC group injected

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Analog watchdog 1 disabled on injected channels

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Analog watchdog 1 enabled on injected channels

fields.name: AWD1EN
fields.description: ADC analog watchdog 1 enable on scope ADC group regular

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Analog watchdog 1 disabled on regular channels

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Analog watchdog 1 enabled on regular channels

fields.name: AWD1SGL
fields.description: ADC analog watchdog 1 monitoring a single channel or all channels

enum_values.name: All
enum_values.description: Analog watchdog 1 enabled on all channels

enum_values.name: Single
enum_values.description: Analog watchdog 1 enabled on single channel selected in AWD1CH

fields.name: JQM
fields.description: ADC group injected contexts queue mode

enum_values.name: Mode0
enum_values.description: JSQR Mode 0: Queue maintains the last written configuration into JSQR

enum_values.name: Mode1
enum_values.description: JSQR Mode 1: An empty queue disables software and hardware triggers of the injected sequence

fields.name: JDISCEN
fields.description: ADC group injected sequencer discontinuous mode

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Discontinuous mode on injected channels disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Discontinuous mode on injected channels enabled

fields.name: DISCNUM
fields.description: ADC group regular sequencer discontinuous number of ranks

fields.name: DISCEN
fields.description: ADC group regular sequencer discontinuous mode

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Discontinuous mode on regular channels disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Discontinuous mode on regular channels enabled

fields.name: CONT
fields.description: ADC group regular continuous conversion mode

enum_values.name: Preserve
enum_values.description: Preserve DR register when an overrun is detected

enum_values.name: Overwrite
enum_values.description: Overwrite DR register when an overrun is detected

fields.name: EXTEN
fields.description: ADC group regular external trigger polarity

enum_values.name: RisingEdge
enum_values.description: Trigger detection on the rising edge

enum_values.name: FallingEdge
enum_values.description: Trigger detection on the falling edge

enum_values.name: BothEdges
enum_values.description: Trigger detection on both the rising and falling edges

fields.name: EXTSEL
fields.description: ADC group regular external trigger source

enum_values.name: FourteenBit
enum_values.description: 14-bit resolution in legacy mode (not optimized power consumption)

enum_values.name: TwelveBit
enum_values.description: 12-bit resolution in legacy mode (not optimized power consumption)

enum_values.name: DR
enum_values.description: Store output data in DR only

fields.name: ROVSE
fields.description: ADC oversampler enable on scope ADC group regular

fields.name: JOVSE
fields.description: ADC oversampler enable on scope ADC group injected

fields.name: TROVS
fields.description: ADC oversampling discontinuous mode (triggered mode) for ADC group regular

enum_values.name: Automatic
enum_values.description: All oversampled conversions for a channel are run following a trigger

enum_values.name: Triggered
enum_values.description: Each oversampled conversion for a channel needs a new trigger

enum_values.name: Continued
enum_values.description: Oversampling is temporary stopped and continued after injection sequence

enum_values.name: Resumed
enum_values.description: Oversampling is aborted and resumed from start after injection sequence

registers.name: SQR1
registers.description: ADC group regular sequencer ranks register 1

registers.name: SQR2
registers.description: ADC group regular sequencer ranks register 2

registers.name: SQR3
registers.description: ADC group regular sequencer ranks register 3

registers.name: SQR4
registers.description: ADC group regular sequencer ranks register 4

registers.name: DR
registers.description: ADC group regular conversion data register

fields.name: JEXTEN
fields.description: ADC group injected external trigger polarity

enum_values.name: RisingEdge
enum_values.description: Trigger detection on the rising edge

enum_values.name: FallingEdge
enum_values.description: Trigger detection on the falling edge

enum_values.name: BothEdges
enum_values.description: Trigger detection on both the rising and falling edges

fields.name: JEXTSEL
fields.description: ADC group injected external trigger source

fields.name: JL
fields.description: ADC group injected sequencer scan length

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Offset is subtracted maintaining data integrity and extending result size (9-bit and 17-bit signed format)

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Offset is subtracted and result is saturated to maintain result size

fields.name: OFFSET_CH
fields.description: Channel selection for the data offset X

fields.name: OFFSET
fields.description: Data offset X for the channel programmed into bits OFFSET_CH

registers.name: JDR%s
registers.description: ADC group injected sequencer rank %s register

fields.name: AWD2CH%s
fields.description: ADC analog watchdog 2 monitored channel selection

enum_values.name: NotMonitored
enum_values.description: Input channel not monitored by AWDx

fields.name: AWD3CH%s
fields.description: ADC analog watchdog 3 monitored channel selection

enum_values.name: NotMonitored
enum_values.description: Input channel not monitored by AWDx

registers.name: DIFSEL
registers.description: ADC channel differential or single-ended mode selection register

enum_values.name: SingleEnded
enum_values.description: Input channel is configured in single-ended mode

enum_values.name: Differential
enum_values.description: Input channel is configured in differential mode

fields.name: CALFACT_D
fields.description: ADC calibration factor in differential mode

fields.name: CALFACT_S
fields.description: ADC calibration factor in single-ended mode

enum_values.name: NotPreselected
enum_values.description: Input channel x is not pre-selected
